# Beudox HR - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a modern React TypeScript SPA built with Vite, featuring a comprehensive HR management system. The application follows a component-driven architecture with clear separation of concerns.

### Technology Stack
- **Frontend**: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui components
- **Routing**: React Router v6 with protected routes
- **State Management**: React Query for server state, React hooks for local state
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Edge Functions + Storage)
- **Forms**: React Hook Form + Zod validation
- **Testing**: Vitest + Playwright

## Key Architectural Patterns

### Authentication & Authorization
- Supabase Auth with email/password
- Role-based access control (RBAC) with route protection
- Session persistence with automatic token refresh
- Password reset and invitation flows

### Data Flow
- React Query for declarative data fetching
- Optimistic updates for better UX
- Real-time subscriptions via Supabase
- Type-safe database operations with generated types

### Component Architecture
- shadcn/ui as design system foundation
- Compound components for complex UI patterns
- Custom hooks for business logic separation
- Responsive design with Tailwind CSS

## Database Schema Highlights

### Core Entities
- **employees**: User profiles with organizational data
- **attendance_records**: Time tracking with OT calculations
- **leave_requests**: Leave management with approval workflows
- **payroll_records**: Salary processing and history
- **projects**: Project management with team assignments
- **evaluations**: Performance review system
- **invoices**: Client billing and payments

### Relationships
- Employees belong to departments and have multiple roles
- Projects have many employees through team assignments
- Leave requests reference leave types and approval chains
- Payroll records link to attendance for OT calculations

## Key Files & Directories

### Entry Points
- `src/main.tsx`: Application bootstrap
- `src/App.tsx`: Main routing and providers
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Root page component

### Core Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main application layout
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Navigation sidebar
- `src/components/ui/`: shadcn/ui component library

### Business Logic
- `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`: Authentication state management
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Permission checking utilities
- `src/lib/client-activity.ts`: Activity logging system

### Integrations
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`: Supabase client configuration
- `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts`: Auto-generated database types

## Routing Structure

### Public Routes
- `/login`: Authentication
- `/forgot-password`: Password recovery
- `/set-password`: Password setup for invites/recovery

### Protected Routes (Role-based)
- `/dashboard`: Main dashboard
- `/employees`: Employee management
- `/leave`: Leave management
- `/payroll`: Payroll processing
- `/projects`: Project management
- `/invoices`: Invoice management
- `/settings`: System configuration

## State Management Patterns

### Local State
- React useState/useReducer for component state
- Custom hooks for complex state logic

### Server State
- React Query for API data fetching
- Cache management with invalidation strategies
- Optimistic updates for mutations

### Global State
- Auth context for user session
- Theme context (next-themes)

## UI/UX Patterns

### Design System
- shadcn/ui components with Radix UI primitives
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- CSS custom properties for theming
- Responsive design patterns

### Form Handling
- React Hook Form for performance
- Zod schemas for validation
- Controlled components with proper error handling

### Data Display
- Tables with sorting/filtering (custom hooks)
- Charts with Recharts
- Loading states and error boundaries

## Development Workflow

### Build & Dev
- Vite for fast development
- Hot module replacement
- TypeScript checking
- ESLint for code quality

### Testing
- Vitest for unit tests
- Playwright for E2E tests
- Component testing utilities

### Deployment
- Static build output
- Environment-based configuration
- Supabase environment management

## Common Patterns & Conventions

### Naming
- PascalCase for components
- camelCase for functions/variables
- kebab-case for CSS classes
- UPPER_SNAKE_CASE for constants

### File Organization
- Feature-based folder structure
- Index files for clean imports
- Type definitions in separate files

### Error Handling
- Try/catch in async operations
- Error boundaries for React errors
- User-friendly error messages
- Logging for debugging

### Performance
- React.memo for expensive components
- useMemo/useCallback for expensive calculations
- Lazy loading for routes
- Image optimization

## Security Considerations

- Row Level Security (RLS) in Supabase
- Input validation with Zod
- XSS protection via React
- CSRF protection via Supabase
- Secure token handling

## Migration & Deployment Notes

- Database migrations via Supabase
- Environment variables for configuration
- Build-time optimization
- CDN for static assets
- Monitoring and logging setup
